opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My ankle is totally swollen and killing me, it burns like fire when I pee, and my eyes are completely bloodshot.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all came on over the last couple of days and it's really bad now — I can barely stand on the ankle and I'm worried something is seriously wrong.

symptom_narrative.character: the ankle is swollen, hot and really painful; my eyes are red and gritty; and it burns when I wee
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the ankle pain is excruciating, I'm limping badly and holding onto furniture to get around
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mainly my right ankle, plus both eyes and a burning down below when I go to the toilet
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty constant since it started, worse when I put weight on the foot
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: taking the weight off the ankle helps a little; over-the-counter ibuprofen barely touches it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've felt really wiped out and a bit feverish and washed-out the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't stand for long, struggling to get around the house on my own

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; had a bad bout of gastro a few weeks ago that has since settled

objective_data_offered.value: right ankle looks visibly swollen and puffy compared with the other side; the patient is limping and offloading it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self/video impression only — no examination, no measurement of warmth, effusion or joint stability

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes look red and bloodshot; no obvious thick pus or discharge visible on camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera impression only — cannot assess the cornea, pupil or deeper eye structures

objective_data_offered.value: says the ankle feels hot to touch and it hurts to put any weight on it
feels feverish and generally unwell but has not measured a temperature
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: no thermometer reading offered — subjective report only
